title: new() lacks test for documented IP:port base_url format
description: JmapChatClient::new() docstring cites 'https://100.64.1.1:8008' as the canonical example but no unit test exercises this case. If the url crate ever changes path() behavior for IP-literal URLs, regression is silent. Test should call JmapChatClient::new(NoneAuth, 'https://100.64.1.1:8008') and assert Ok.
